mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM contents_reply_stats WHERE CTNT_NO = #{ctntNo})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contents_reply_stats (CTNT_NO, REPLY_CNT, UPD_DTTM) VALUES (#{ctntNo}, #{replyCnt}, NOW()) -- 이 부분에 닫는 괄호 추가 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE REPLY_CNT =xs VALUES (REPLY_CNT), UPD_DTTM = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE contents_reply_stats SET REPLY_CNT = #{replyCnt}, UPD_DTTM = NOW() WHERE CTNT_NO = #{ctntNo}
